hero_desc: TKIT Ash-Shahabah is here to accompany your children during their growth with enjoyable and quality Islamic education.
about_title: The Best Integrated Islamic School for Your Little One
about_p1: TKIT Ash-Shahabah is an early childhood education institution established in 2010 in Bekasi. We are here to provide the best education by combining the national curriculum with Islamic values.
about_p2: With professional and experienced educators, we are committed to creating generations that are smart, noble in character, and ready to face future challenges.
vision_text: To shape children who are noble in character, intelligent, and skilled — creating creative and independent individuals.
mission_1: Implement Active, Creative, and Effective Learning.
mission_2: Educate children optimally in accordance with their development and abilities.
mission_3: Prepare students for primary education with achievement of basic competencies.
mission_4: Help students prepare for the next level of education.
facility_desc: We provide a comfortable, safe, and enjoyable learning environment to support children's overall development
activity_desc: Various exciting and educational activities to develop children's potential
faq_q1: What is the minimum age to enroll at TKIT Ash-Shahabah?
faq_a1: Prospective students must be at least 4 years old for Group A and 5 years old for Group B at the start of the school year.
faq_q2: How do I register my child?
faq_a2: Registration is done in person at TKIT Ash-Shahabah. Parents can visit the school during operating hours (08:00 – 11:30) to obtain and fill in the registration form and submit the required documents. We will assist you throughout the registration process.
faq_a3:
Required documents include:
• Copy of Child's Birth Certificate
• Copy of Family Card (KK)
faq_a4: Yes. TKIT Ash-Shahabah provides various activities to support children's development, such as arts, sports, tahfidz (Quran memorization), and Marching Band.
faq_q5: What if I have more questions?
faq_a5: Please contact us via the WhatsApp icon on the website or click the Register Now button to connect directly with TKIT Ash-Shahabah. We will be happy to answer your questions.
faq_contact: Still have questions? Contact us directly
footer_tagline: Educating with love, shaping generations of noble character
footer_address: Mustika Karang Satria Jl. Berlian Raya No 1

teacher_section_desc: Our professional and dedicated educators are ready to accompany your children to grow and develop with full affection
principal_quote: Every child is a star shining in their own way. Here, we are wholeheartedly present to help that light shine through education full of affection, useful knowledge, and noble Islamic values.
role_wali_kelas_b_abu_bakar_ash_shiddiq: Homeroom Teacher TK B Abu Bakar ash-Shiddiq
vision_mission_desc: Our foundation in educating a future generation that is intelligent and noble in character
